article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable rental units at 4281 Grange Street under binding housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a housing agreement with Qualex-Landmark Orchard Holdings Ltd., legally requiring a 5-storey non-market rental building at 4281 Grange Street to stay affordable housing. The agreement is registered on the property title, meaning the rules follow the land even if it is sold.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review whether your development has similar housing agreement obligations on title.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025
